# Open Thread 439

**From:** Astral Codex Ten <astralcodexten@substack.com>  
**Date:** 2026-06-22T15:01:34.000Z

---

View this post on the web at https://www.astralcodexten.com/p/open-thread-439

This is the weekly visible open thread. Post about anything you want, ask random questions, whatever. ACX has an unofficial subreddit [ https://substack.com/redirect/36993019-954e-4108-b351-568c6a7c8ada?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], Discord [ https://substack.com/redirect/263699f6-ccaa-4b39-914b-ea9462bd5c28?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], and bulletin board [ https://substack.com/redirect/039c555a-6797-48d9-98a0-06d76c14f80c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], and in-person meetups around the world [ https://substack.com/redirect/8b60c11e-e70f-4a14-990f-fec8e41a1661?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. Most content is free, some is subscriber only; you can subscribe here [ https://substack.com/redirect/73b8de86-d17b-4a3e-a637-621c075a94a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. Also:
1: The Future of Life Foundation, which unconvincingly denies being part of our conspiracy, asks me to signal-boost their Epistemic Case Study Competition [ https://substack.com/redirect/d14cd2ee-eea0-4658-b9e8-a58c13895972?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. Prizes up to $50K for finding “the best workflows and methodologies for using AI to produce reliable, trustworthy knowledge bases, grounded in real-world cases”. If you have a difficult controversial question (”is eating eggs healthy?”) what set of AI tools, prompts, pipelines, human interventions, etc can you combine to be most likely to get a correct answer? Deadline July 19, learn more here [ https://substack.com/redirect/d14cd2ee-eea0-4658-b9e8-a58c13895972?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ].
2: More ACX grantee results: Eli Elster describes his research on psilocybin use in Lesotho [ https://substack.com/redirect/6884a1c6-3273-4213-a09b-3e5e06e6e629?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ].
3: New York primary election is this Tuesday. The South Manhattan congressional primary has somehow turned into a proxy war [ https://substack.com/redirect/529ea7f0-4e0c-4b47-b0c1-ecfd4a7e30f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ] between different Silicon Valley AI factions. ACX supports the pro-safety faction, and so continues to urge readers to vote for Alex Bores.
4: Thanks to everyone who voted for Book Review finalists. I’ll try to have results by next Open Thread.

Unsubscribe https://substack..lL0QUeS7xOwYi9n9FJSudTRgNSP9FVj43DzWXqxiNkc?

---
